bracu_official.title: BRAC University IEEE society hosts seminar on careers in big tech and ai startups
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University IEEE society is organizing a seminar to explore career paths in the big tech industry and AI startups.

bracu_official.title: Argentine ambassador joins BRAC University students to watch his home team’s World Cup quarter-final match
